name: Tortilla Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Fresh corn, cut from cob
84 ounces whole tomatoes (3 cans), or fresh equivalent
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tortillas into one-and-a-half inch squares and sauté quickly in oil until crispy. Place on paper towels to prevent them from becoming soggy, then wrap in paper towels to keep warm and set aside.
2. Sauté chopped onion in oil until golden brown.
3. Puree tomatoes in a food processor or blender, and pour into the cooking pot with the sautéed onions.
4. Add chopped celery, cut corn, chopped green beans, and chopped cabbage. Bring soup liquids to a boil, then lower heat and let simmer until vegetables are tender (about twenty minutes).
5. Before serving, season generously with Spike and Vegit and add a dash of hot sauce.
6. Place tortilla squares into soup bowls. Pour in the soup and top with generous helpings of grated nuts.
Serves 6-8.
